summary: JSON-parse --parent, --cover, --icon flags in pages create and pages update.
reason: Generator emits raw-string assignment for oneOf/anyOf union fields in the spec; Notion's API requires these as JSON objects, not strings, causing a 400 on any flag-based call.
validated_outcome: pages create --parent '{"type":"page_id","page_id":"..."}' now returns 200; previously returned HTTP 400 validation_error.
